goal: Every component t() reference resolves to a real EN i18n key (fix missing keys AND mis-pathed refs), then translate new keys across 26 locales.

phases.goal: Make EN whole: audit every t('ns:key') in src against en/<ns>.json; add missing keys with English values; fix mis-pathed refs (e.g. common:cancel -> common:actions.cancel).
definition_of_done: audit script reports 0 unresolved t() refs against en
providers:/accounts: keys used by add-account flow exist in en
settings/accounts/add renders English, not raw keys

phases.goal: Translate newly-added/changed EN keys across all 26 non-English locales, parity + placeholders preserved.
